transcript_summary: Revenue for Q1 2024 came in at $118.8B, missed analyst estimates of $123.7B. EPS of $7.8 missed the consensus of $7.8. Management guided above for next quarter. The CEO highlighted strength in advertising, noting 38% YoY growth. Gross margins expanded to 74.8%, driven by product mix shift. Free cash flow reached $3.0B for the quarter. On the macro environment, CFO noted AI-driven demand acceleration across all product lines. The company is focused on AI integration across core product offerings to drive long-term shareholder value. Share buybacks of $9.3B were authorized for fiscal year 2024.

Revenue for Q2 2024 came in at $100.2B, beat analyst estimates of $94.0B. EPS of $6.59 missed the consensus of $6.94. Management guided below for next quarter. The CEO highlighted strength in cloud, noting 14% YoY growth. Gross margins expanded to 68.1%, driven by scale efficiencies. Free cash flow reached $22.9B for the quarter. On the macro environment, CFO noted cautious consumer sentiment impacting discretionary spending. The company is focused on operational efficiency and cost discipline to drive long-term shareholder value. Share buybacks of $13.2B were authorized for fiscal year 2024.
